questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If day before yesterday was Friday, what will be the third day after the day - after- tomorrow?
questions.solution:
The day before yesterday was Friday. Therefore, today is Sunday. 
The day-after-tomorrow will be Tuesday
Tuesday + 3 = Saturday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: By looking in a mirror it appears that it is $6: 30$ in the clock. What is the real time?
questions.solution: When it appears $6: 30$ in mirror, the real time would be $5: 30$.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock gains five minutes every hour. What will be the angle traversed by the second hand in one minute?
questions.solution:
Each second-space equals $1^{\circ}$.
A clock gains five minutes every hour.
It means the clock gains $\frac{5}{60}$ minutes in one minute.
$\frac{5}{60} \times 360=30$
The second hand will traverse $360.5^{\circ}$ in one minute.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Reaching the place of meeting 20 minutes before 8 : 50 hrs Satish found himself thirty minutes earlier than the man who came 40 minutes late. What was the scheduled time of the meeting?
questions.solution:
Satish reached at $08: 50-00: 20=08: 30$
He was thirty minutes earlier than the man who came 40 minutes late. It implies that Satish was 10 minutes late.
∴ Scheduled time of the meeting = $8: 30-0: 10$ = $8: 20$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If the day before yesterday was Sunday, what day will it be three days after the day after tomorrow?
questions.solution:
Day before yesterday was Sunday.
Therefore, today is Tuesday.
Day after tomorrow will be Thursday.
Thursday + 3 = Sunday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Anil reached a place on Friday. He came to know that he was three days earlier than the scheduled day. If he had reached there on the following Sunday, how many days late/early he would have been?
questions.solution:
Anil reached the place on Friday and he was three days earlier than the scheduled day.
Therefore, the scheduled day = Friday + 3 days = Monday 
If he had reached on Sunday then he would have earlier than one day.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If the day before yesterday was Thursday, when will Sunday be ?
questions.solution:
Day before yesterday was Thursday.
Today is Saturday.
Tomorrow will be Sunday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If the day after tomorrow is Sunday, what day was tomorrow's day before yesterday?
questions.solution:
The day after tomorrow is Sunday.
Therefore, today is Friday.
The day on tomorrow's day before yesterday = Friday-1 = Thursday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If 9 th of the month falls on the day preceding Sunday, on what day will 1st of the month fall?
questions.solution:
According to question, 9th → Saturday 
Therefore, 9-7 = 2nd → Saturday
∴ 1st → Friday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If 15th June falls 3 days after tomorrow, that is Friday, on what day will the last of the month fall?
questions.solution:
Tomorrow ⇒ Friday
Friday + 3 = Monday
Monday = 15 th
Other Monday ⇒ 22, 29
Therefore, 30th June = Tuesday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: After $9^{\prime} 0$ clock at what time between 9 p.m. and 10 p.m. will the hour and minute hands of a clock point in opposite direction?
questions.solution:
At 9 O'clock, the minute hand is $9 \times 5=45$ minute - spaces behind the hour hand. Therefore, the minute hand will have to gain $45-30=10$ minute space over the hour hand.
∵ Gain of 55 minute spaces equals 60 minutes.
∴ Gain of 15 minute spaces equals
$=\frac{60}{55} \times 15=\frac{180}{11}=16 \frac{4}{11}$
Therefore, hour and minute hands of a clock point in opposite direction after 9 O'clock at $16 \frac{4}{11}$ minutes past 9.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock with only dots marking $3,6,9$ and 12 positions has been upside down in front of a mirror. A person reads the time in the reflection as $6: 10$. The real time is
questions.solution: The real time is $12: 20$.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: At what time are the hands of clocks together between 6 and 7?
questions.solution:
Hands of clock will be together at $32 \frac{8}{11}$ minutes past 6 .
There are 30 minute spaces between hour and minute hand at 6 O' clock.
The minute hand gains 55 minutes in 60 minutes
∴ It will gain 30 minutes in
$\frac{60}{55} \times 33=32 \frac{8}{11}$ minutes
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock with only dot markings $3,6,9$ and 12 positions has been kept upside down in front of a mirror. A person reads the time in the reflection of the clock as 12:30 the actual that will be
questions.solution: The actual time will be 6 O'clock.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Suresh was born on 4th October 1999. Shashikanth was born 6 days before Suresh. The Independence Day of that year fell on Sunday. Which day was Shashikanth born?
questions.solution:
Shashikant was born on 29th September 1999.
15th August, 1999 was Sunday.
Days upto 29th September from 15 August
$16+29=45$ days $=6$ weeks 3 old days
Sunday +3 = Wednesday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If the 23rd of a month is a Sunday, what day it would have been two weeks and four more days earlier?
questions.solution:
Two weeks earlier than 23rd was also Sunday.
$\begin{aligned}
& 23-7=16 \\
& 16-7=9
\end{aligned}$
4 days earlier than 9 means 5th
9th ⇒ Sunday
8th ⇒ Saturday
7th ⇒ Friday
6th ⇒ Thursday
5th ⇒ Wednesday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock goes slow from midnight by 5 mts . at the end of the first hour, by 10 mts. at the end of the second hour, by 15 mts. at the end of the 3rd hour and so on. What will be the time by this clock after 6 hours?
questions.solution:
Time after 6 hours after midnight = 6 am
Clock will go slow in 6 hours $=6 \times 5=30$ minutes
∴ Time shown by the clock
$=6: 00-0: 30$ minutes $=5: 30$ am.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Reaching a place of appointment on Friday, I found that I was two days earlier than the scheduled day. If I had reached on the following Wednesday, how many days late would I have been?
questions.solution:
Friday → 2 days earlier
Therefore, scheduled day = Friday $+2=$ Sunday, Sunday +3 = Wednesday
Therefore, I would have been late by 4 days including Sunday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Mrs. Susheela celebrated her wedding anniversary on Tuesday, 30th September 1997. When will she celebrate her next wedding anniversary on the same day?
questions.solution:
30th September 1998 ⇒ Wednesday
30th September 1999 ⇒ Thursday
30th September 2000 ⇒ Saturday
Because 2000 is a Leap Year and there is one extra day in the month of February.
30th September 2001 ⇒ Sunday
30th September 2002 ⇒ Monday
30th September 2003 ⇒ Tuesday
An ordinary year has one odd day.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If the day after tomorrow is Tuesday what day will two days after the day after tomorrow be?
questions.solution: Two days after Tuesday will be Thursday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If John celebrated his victory day on Tuesday, 5th January 1965, when will he celebrate his next victory day on the same day?
questions.solution:
5 January 1965 ⇒ Tuesday 
5 January 1966 ⇒ Wednesday 
5 January 1967 ⇒ Thursday 
5 January 1968 ⇒ Friday 
5 January 1969 ⇒ Sunday 
Since, 1968 is a Leap Year. 
5 January 1970 ⇒ Monday 
5 January 1971 ⇒ Tuesday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: In the year 1996, the Republic day was celebrated on Friday. On which day was the Independence day celebrated in the year 2000?
questions.solution:
The year 1996 was a Leap Year.
Number of days remaining in the 1996
$=366-26=340$ days
= 48 weeks 4 odd days
1997, 1998 and 1999 together have 3 odd days.
2000 was a Leap year
Days upto 15th August 2000
$31+29+31+30+31+30+31+15=228$ days
$\frac{228}{7}=32$ weeks 4 odd days
Now, total number of odd days
$=4+3+4=11$
$\frac{11}{7}=1$ week 4 odd days
15th August 2000 was 4 days beyond Friday, i.e., Tuesday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If two days before yesterday was Friday, what day will be day after tomorrow?
questions.solution:
Three days before today was Friday.
Today is Monday.
Therefore, day after tomorrow will be Wednesday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: The day before yesterday was Sunday. What will be the day after tomorrow?
questions.solution:
Today is Tuesday.
Therefore, the day after tomorrow would be Thursday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: 5th of a month falls two days after Monday. What day of the month will precede 19th of it?
questions.solution:
Two days after Monday means Wednesday.
$\begin{aligned}
& 5 \rightarrow \text { Wednesday } \\
& 5+7=12 \rightarrow \text { Wednesday } \\
& 12+7=19 \rightarrow \text { Wednesday }
\end{aligned}$
Therefore, Tuesday will precede 19th that month.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock goes fast by one minute during the first hour, by two minutes at the end of the second hour, by 4 minutes at the end of 3rd hour, by eight minutes by the end of 4th hour, and so on. At the end of which hour, will it be fast by just over sixty minutes?
questions.solution:
First hour $\rightarrow 1$ minute
Second hour $\rightarrow 2$ minutes
Third hour $\rightarrow 4$ minutes
Fourth hour $\rightarrow 8$ minutes
Fifth hour $\rightarrow 16$ minutes
Sixth hour $\rightarrow 32$ minutes
Seventh hour$\rightarrow 64$ minutes
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock only with dots marking 3, 6, 9 and 12 O'clock position has been kept upside down in front of a mirror. A person reads the time in the reflection of the clock as $10: 20$. What is the actual time?
questions.solution: The actual time would be $8: 10$.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If the third Friday of a month is 16th what date is the fourth Tuesday of that month?
questions.solution:
Third Friday = 16th
∴ First Friday $=2 \mathrm{nd}$
First Tuesday = 6th
∴ Fourth Tuesday $=27$ th
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: The Independence day in 1988 was celebrated on a Wednesday. On what day was it celebrated in the year1989?
questions.solution:
The year 1989 was a normal year.
Days upto 15 August 1989 from August 15, $1988=16+30+31 +30+31+31+28+31+30+ 31+30+31+15=365=52$ weeks 1 day Therefore, Wednesday + 1 = Thursday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Hari remembers that his father's birthday is between 13th and 16th of June, whereas his sister remembers that their father's birthday is between 14th and 18th of June. On which day is their father's birthday, which both agree?
questions.solution:
According to Hari, his father's birthday may be on 14th or 15th June.
According to Hari's sister, their father's birthday may be on 15th, 16th or 17th June.
Common Date ⇒ 15th June
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Tell the number of days from 26 January 2006 to 23 September 2006 (including both dates).
questions.solution:
Number of Days in
January ⇒ 31 - 25 = 6
February ⇒ 28 (2006 is not a leap year)
March ⇒ 31
April ⇒ 30
May ⇒ 31
June ⇒ 30
July ⇒ 31
August ⇒ 31
September ⇒ 23
Total ⇒ 241 days
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If Friday falls on 15th of September 2000, what will be the day of 15th of September 2001?
questions.solution:
Number of days from September 15,2000 to September 15,2001
$=365+1=366$
$366 \div 7=2$ odd days
∴ September 15,2001
⇒ Saturday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Find out the day from the problem given. If the 1st of November falls on Monday, what day will the 25th of November be?
questions.solution:
Mondays ⟹1st, 8th, 15th, 22nd and 29th
23rd → Tuesday
24th → Wednesday
25th → Thursday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Saturday comes after 3 days on 4th of a month. Find out the day on 27th of that month.
questions.solution:
4th =Saturday
Other Saturdays ⇒ 11, 28, 25
Therefore, 27th ⇒ Monday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If day before yesterday was Tuesday, the day after tomorrow will be
questions.solution:
The day before yesterday was Tuesday
Today, it is Tuesday $+2=$ Thursday
Tomorrow ⇒ Friday
The day after tomorrow ⇒ Saturday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Kamala would like to complete all her home-work before 10.00 p.m. in order to watch an important TV programme. She has 40 minutes assignment in each of her five prepared subjects. What is the latest time at which she can start and still complete her home-work in the time for the programme?
questions.solution:
$5 \times 40=200$ minutes $=3$ hours 20 minutes
Now, $10: 00-03: 20$
$=06: 40 \mathrm{PM}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If the 2nd of a month falls on Sunday, what day will the 31 st of that month be?
questions.solution:
2nd, 9th, 16th, 23rd and 30th ⇒ Sunday
Therefore, 31st ⇒ Monday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Given that 25th February 2008 is Monday, what day is 2 nd March of 2008 ?
questions.solution:
2008 was a Leap year.
26th → Tuesday
27th → Wednesday
28th → Thursday
29th → Friday
1st → Saturday
2nd → Sunday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock only with only dots marking 3, 6, 9 and 12 position has been kept upside down in front of a mirror. A person reads the time in the reflection of the clock as 4.50 . What is the actual time?
questions.solution: The actual time would be $2: 40$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A clock with only dots marking 3, 6, 9 and 12 positions has been kept upside down in front of a mirror. A person reads the time in the reflection as 9.50 . What is the actual time?
questions.solution: The actual time would be 8:40
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If 8th of April falls on Monday, what would be the 30th day of that month ?
questions.solution:
Mondays $\Rightarrow 8,15,22$ and 29
Therefore, 30th ⇒ Tuesday
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: The Chairman of the Selection Committee arrived at the Interview room for conducting an interview at 10 minutes to 12 : 30 hrs . He was earlier by twenty minutes than the other members of the board, who arrived late by 30 minutes. At what time were the interview scheduled?
questions.solution:
The Chairman of the Selection Committee arrived at 12.20 hrs . Other members arrived at12.40 hrs.
Scheduled time of Interview $=12.10 \mathrm{hrs}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: In Ravi's clock shop, two clocks were brought for repairs. One clock has the cuckoo coming out every sixteen minutes, while the other one has the cuckoo coming out every eighteen minutes. Both cuckoos come out at 12.00 noon. When will they both come out together again?
questions.solution:
LCM of 16 and 18
$=2 \times 8 \times 9=144$
Both Cuckoos will come out together again at
$12: 00+2: 24=2: 24 \text { PM }$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If 50 minutes ago, it was 45 min utes past four' O clock, how many minutes is it until six 'O clock?
questions.solution:
Time at present
$\begin{aligned} & =4: 45+0: 50=5: 35 \\ & 6: 00-5: 35=0: 25  =25 \text { minutes }\end{aligned}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Ram leaves his house at 20 mins to seven in the morning, reaches Kunal's house in 25 mins . They finish their breakfast in another 15 mins and leave for their office which takes another 35 minutes. At what time do they leave Kunal's house to reach their office?
questions.solution:
Ram left his house at 6.40 AM. He reached Kunal's house at 7.05 AM .
They finished their breakfast in 15 minutes and left for office at 7.20 AM.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Reaching the place of meeting on Tuesday 15 minutes before 08 : 30 hours I found myself half an hour earlier than the man who was 40 minutes late. What was the scheduled time of the meeting?
questions.solution:
I reached at
$08: 30-00: 15$ = $08: 15$ hours
I was $40-30$ = 10 minutes late
Therefore, scheduled time
= $08: 15-00: 10$ = 08:05 hours.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: The bus for Chennai leaves every 30 minutes from a bus depot. The enquiry clerk told a passenger that the bus for Chennai left 10 minutes ago, and the next bus will leave at $10: 30$ a.m. What was the time when enquiry clerk told this?
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: $A$ watch reads 7.30 . If the minute hand points West, then in which direction will the hour hand point?
questions.solution: The minute and points West, it means the clock has been rotated through $90^{\circ}$ clockwise. Therefore, hour hand will point NorthWest.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If two days after day after tomorrow is Sunday, what day was the day before yesterday?
questions.solution:
The day after tomorrow would be Friday.
Today is Wednesday.
The day before yesterday was Monday.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Today is Friday. On the last Monday the date was 29th December, 1975 . The date today is
questions.solution:
Last Monday was December 29, 1975.
Tuesday → December 30,1975
Wednesday → December 31, 1975
Thursday → January 1, 1976
Friday → January 2, 1976
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
